productDisplayName: Hanes Men Navy Blue Premium Bikini Briefs
description: Composition Blue bikini brief made of combed cotton ribbed fabric, has a plush cushioned signature logo centered contrast waistband with duo-dry moisture management technology, shaped-to-Fit double layered contoured pouch, reinforced fabric covered rubber leg bands, and printed label on the inner Fit Mid rise Wash care Machine wash warm at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry cleanable This bikini brief from hanes is crafted using superior cotton elastane fabric that provides quick dry comfort. The cut allows free leg movement, while the printed label on the inside offers tagless comfort. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32" The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
